title: Coding Agents for Data Engineering
subtitle: Sobeys x Databricks — Accelerating SDP, Medallion + DABs

title: One agent, twelve dialects
body:
Generic code that ignores our conventions
Sometimes legacy DLT we are retiring
Inconsistent naming across engineers
No shared data-quality policy
Harder to review and onboard

title: Where each agent fits
columns:
Repo-scale work
Pipelines, DABs, refactors
Holds instructions + skills

In the workspace
Notebooks, SQL, pipelines
UC-aware and inline

Q and A over your data
Plain-English questions
Not code generation

title: Two ways to teach it
columns:
Always-on standards
Loaded every session
Naming, layers, guardrails
Our house style, encoded

On-demand power tools
Invoked by name
Bundle templates + docs
Repeatable and shareable

title: Instructions: standards, always on
body:
Modern SDP only — legacy DLT is banned
Medallion Bronze, Silver, Gold rules
Naming and Unity Catalog, no DBFS
Data-quality Expectations on Silver
DABs with dev and prod, dev-only from agents
A definition-of-done self-check

title: Skills: repeatable tasks, on demand
body:
/sdp-bronze-ingest scaffolds a compliant table
/legacy-dlt-migrate upgrades old DLT
Skills carry templates and reference docs
Invoked by name when relevant
Shared in Git across the team

title: Five beats
body:
1  Naked agent — generic output
2  Plus instructions — on-standard, refuses legacy DLT
3  Plus skills — scaffold in seconds
4  Agent runs the loop — validate, deploy dev, self-fix
5  Team scale — standards in Git

title: The running example
columns:
brz_pos_transaction — Auto Loader
slv_pos_transaction — Expectations
gld_daily_sales_by_store_category

dev and prod targets
Parameterized catalog and schema
validate --strict before deploy

title: Guardrails for the enterprise
body:
Agents deploy to dev only
Prod is CI/CD plus human PR approval
Secrets via secret scopes
Every PR reviewed, ideally by a second agent first
The agent accelerates, the human merges

title: The flywheel: standards in Git
body:
CLAUDE.md and skills committed next to code
git clone — every engineer inherits them
Change a standard once, open a PR
The whole team levels up at once

title: Call to action
body:
Co-author the Sobeys CLAUDE.md
Turn your top 3 patterns into skills
Adopt the guardrails: dev-only, PR review, scopes
Repo: github.com/brianlui-dbx/dih-vibe-coding
